url.scheme.message: Target only supports HTTP(S) request URLs.

headers.unsafeWhen: Duplicate header names collapse in generated Python mapping literals.

cookies.jar.message: Cookie jar files require helper loading through MozillaCookieJar.
cookies.jar.requiredRuntime: Filesystem access to the referenced cookie jar file.

tls.ca.message: requests can pass a per-request CA bundle path.

tls.client-cert.message: requests can pass per-request TLS client certificate paths.

network.message: requests output does not preserve curl network binding or connection routing.

dns.message: requests output does not preserve curl DNS resolver overrides.

redirects.message: requests supports redirect following and limits.

timeout.message: requests supports connect and read timeouts.

http.version.2.message: requests does not expose forced HTTP/2 selection; generated code uses transport defaults.

http.version.3.message: requests does not expose HTTP/3 selection.

debug.message: requests output cannot reproduce curl verbose or trace wire dumps.

external-ref.message: Generated code must provide runtime handling for external references.
external-ref.requiredRuntime: Filesystem or stdin access to referenced inputs.
